nasb.text: Then His mother and His brothers *arrived, and standing outside they sent word to Him and called Him.

esv.text: And his mother and his brothers came, and standing outside they sent to him and called him.

cnv.text: 耶穌的母親和弟弟來了，站在外面，傳話給他，叫他出來。

ccb.text: 这时候，耶稣的母亲和弟兄来了，他们站在外面，托人叫耶稣。

csbs.text: 后来，耶稣的母亲和弟弟们来了，站在外面，派人去叫耶稣。
